title: Beekeeper Villager
description: Adds a villager that trades bee related items (pre release)
body: Adds a villager that will sell bee related items like most vanilla bee items and the bee cage wich can be used to capture and move bees (punch not right click to capture.) Also it is highly recomended that you install a mod like [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) and [EMI Trades](https://modrinth.com/mod/emitrades) or any mod that lets you see recipies and villager trades. The honey drainer is the workstation used by this villager. I just lost the file again so I am doing another reconstruction of the mod "soon". and I might also add beehive frames to go with the honey drainer.
